prompt: อยากทำ side project แต่ยังไม่รู้จะทำอะไรดี ช่วยคิดหน่อย

assertions.text: Skill adapts question count to request complexity — does not force all 7 phases for a casual request
Final output includes concrete project ideas, not just a refined prompt
Uses casual, accessible language matching the user's tone — no unnecessary jargon
Total questions asked across all phases is 8 or fewer
